label: Transparent red-eyed tree frog motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated red-eyed tree frog motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single red-eyed tree frog with accurate amphibian anatomy, vivid leaf-green body, bright red eyes with black pupils, orange feet and toe pads, subtle blue side markings, moist smooth skin, playful friendly onboarding-system energy, crisp silhouette edges, and natural frog detail. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full frog, head, eyes, body, legs, orange feet, and toe pads without cropping. Pose: perched and slightly alert, compact but dynamic, facing slightly toward viewer. Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the frog, no leaf, no branch, no pond scene, no second animal, no cartoon mascot look, no toy look, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog light-mode design-system board, final production asset. Input image role: The visible transparent red-eyed tree frog motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog", derived from the visible transparent frog cutout. Canvas and resolution: exact 3840 x 2160 pixels, wide 16:9 landscape, high-resolution 4K board. Required visible sections with large readable labels: Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog, Red Eyed Tree Frog, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from leaf green frog body, bright red eyes, orange feet and toe pads, cream belly, blue side markings, dark pupil black, and rainforest pond neutrals. UI coverage: onboarding stepper, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress status, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons. Style: playful onboarding system, polished shadcn/tweakcn-style UI, precise grid, compact rounded controls, 8px radius, lily-pad cards, pond-neutral surfaces, green primary actions, red eye focus and alert states, orange foot call-to-action accents, soft waterline dividers. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no generic purple/blue gradients; no unrelated saturated colors. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog" or "Red Eyed Tree Frog", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog dark-mode design-system board, final production asset. Input image roles: The visible transparent red-eyed tree frog motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible red-eyed tree frog cutout. Canvas and resolution: exact 3840 x 2160 pixels, wide 16:9 landscape, high-resolution 4K board. Required visible sections with large readable labels: Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog, Red Eyed Tree Frog, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Visual details: dark rainforest pond background derived from wet stone, pupil black, deep moss, and night water; foreground from cream belly and pale lily pad; primary actions from luminous frog green; focus and alerts from red eye; call-to-action accents from orange foot; secondary states from pond teal/blue side markings; subtle wet-skin highlights and waterline dividers. UI coverage: onboarding stepper, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, progress status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Red Eyed Tree Frog" or "Red Eyed Tree Frog", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
